steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says sellers must "bolster retention" because initial enthusiasm is "quick to _____". The blank must describe what enthusiasm does fast — and that action must logically cause customers to cancel subscriptions, making retention a challenge.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — subside: enthusiasm that subsides quickly means customers lose interest fast, which directly explains why sellers need retention incentives. ✓
  • Choice B — rejuvenate: enthusiasm that intensifies would increase commitment, contradicting the need to "bolster retention." ✗
  • Choice C — converge: enthusiasm cannot converge — this word describes coming together, not the fading of a feeling. ✗
  • Choice D — resolve: enthusiasm cannot logically resolve in this context; the word means to settle or solve something, not to fade. ✗
A is correct.
